message:
🐛 fix: add rate limiting to link checker to avoid network errors

- Reduce max-concurrency to 2 to avoid rate limiting
- Increase timeout to 60s and retry-wait-time to 10s
- Increase max-retries to 5 and max-redirects to 10
- Add proper user-agent header
- Exclude blog.kubestellar.io (not set up yet)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -38,10 +38,13 @@ jobs:
             --exclude "forms.gle" \
             --exclude "localhost" \
             --exclude "127.0.0.1" \
-            --max-redirects 5 \
-            --timeout 30 \
-            --retry-wait-time 5 \
-            --max-retries 3 \
+            --exclude "blog.kubestellar.io" \
+            --max-redirects 10 \
+            --max-concurrency 2 \
+            --timeout 60 \
+            --retry-wait-time 10 \
+            --max-retries 5 \
+            --user-agent "Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; KubeStellarLinkChecker/1.0)" \
             "https://kubestellar.io" || true
 
           # Check docs site
@@ -55,10 +58,13 @@ jobs:
             --exclude "forms.gle" \
             --exclude "localhost" \
             --exclude "127.0.0.1" \
-            --max-redirects 5 \
-            --timeout 30 \
-            --retry-wait-time 5 \
-            --max-retries 3 \
+            --exclude "blog.kubestellar.io" \
+            --max-redirects 10 \
+            --max-concurrency 2 \
+            --timeout 60 \
+            --retry-wait-time 10 \
+            --max-retries 5 \
+            --user-agent "Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; KubeStellarLinkChecker/1.0)" \
             "https://docs.kubestellar.io" || true
 
           # Combine and extract 404 errors
